name: leadbay
description: AI lead discovery, qualification, and outreach prep. Ask Claude to find, research, and prepare outreach on B2B prospects using your Leadbay account.
long_description: Leadbay MCP surfaces your Leadbay inbox to Claude — fresh daily batches of AI-qualified leads, deep research on any company or contact, outreach-ready prep (email + LinkedIn), and outreach logging. Requires a Leadbay account (https://leadbay.ai).

leadbay_token.title: Leadbay bearer token
leadbay_token.description: Mint one with: npx -y @leadbay/mcp@0.7 login --email <you> --region <us|fr> (then copy LEADBAY_TOKEN from the credentials file the command writes — path is shown on stderr)

leadbay_region.title: Region
leadbay_region.description: Leadbay backend for your account (us or fr). If you don't know, try fr first — EU accounts are the default.

leadbay_mcp_write.title: Enable write tools
leadbay_mcp_write.description: Allow Claude to call composite write tools (refine_prompt, adjust_audience, report_outreach, bulk_qualify_leads, enrich_titles, answer_clarification, import_leads). ON by default since 0.3.0 — turn this off only if you want a strictly read-only agent.
